/CAL SENTENCING ON ESS/REVK/CTORD PURSUANT TO THE REMITTITUR, COUNT 3 ISHEREBY REDUCED TO A MISDEMEANOR AND ORIGINAL SENTENCE OF 10-12-18 ON COUNT3 IS VACATED,/AJW/X:AS TO COUNT 2, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO ONE-THIRD THEMIDTERM TO A TERM OF 8 MONTHS STATE PRISON/X:AS TO COUNT 3, DEFENDANT ISSENTENCED TO 6 MONTH COUNTY JAIL CONCURRENT TO SENTENCE ON COUNT 2/DEF:TORECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 182 DAYS COUNTY JAIL,182 SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF364 DAYS,/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/STATES/COA:40/ICNA/VF5:300/PAR/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/CTORD:SENTENCE IS DEEMED SERVED PURSUANT TO PC 1170(A)(3)/CTORD:CDCR TO CALCULATE ANY SURPLUS OF CUSTODYCREDITS/PAR11/PAROLE70/PAROLE UNIT2/PARDATE:05-11-20/PAR70/CCC:17005677 AND 18019169/

/CAL:HEARING TO READ REMITTITUR ONTO RECORD/TEXT:COUNT 3 IS REMANDED TO MODIFY THE JUDGMENT AS A MISDEMEANOR PC22810(A), JUDGMENT AFFIRMED AS TO ALLOTHER COUNTS; REMITTITUR SPREAD UPON MINUTES/PREPLEA:06-09-20/CONTD:RECEIPT OF PRE PLEA REPORT & RESENTENCING/

/AJW/CH2:SP 8 M:3:ESS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 167 D/CTS: 167/X: THE SAME SENTENCE IS IMPOSED ON BOTH COUNTS TWO AND THREE AND ARE CONCURRENT,/X: SHOULD THE ESSSENTENCE BE IMPOSED, IT SHALL BE CONSECUTIVE TO THE 4 YEARS STATE PRISION IMPOSED IN CASE #17005677,/CTORD: AS A CONDITION OF PROBATION, THE DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO COMPLETE ONE YEAR OF RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT THROUGH THE FATHER ALFRED PROGRAM/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS ANKLE BRACELET TO BE MONITORED BY ADULT PROBATION/X: THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT WILL PICK UP THE DEFENDANT FROM JAIL, ESCORT HIM TO THE FITTING OF THE ANKLE MONITOR, AND THEN ESCORT HIM TO THE FATHER ALFRED PROGRAM,/SA2: 1501 VAN NESS AND 1301 FRANKLIN STREETS, SF/SA2: JUN HAO ZITOU, MUHAMMAD AHMAD AWAN, LARRY WONG/SAORD4: 25 YARDS/SAORD/RX/WEAP/DNACOMP/STATES/IND/WS/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/ /COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/DISM3/PROB EXT: 10-05-21

/TRL PHASE JD/X: AT NOON, THE JURY SIGNALS IT HAS REACHED A VERDICT,/X: THE VERDICTS ARE GUILTY TO COUNTS TWO AND THREE,/X: THE JURY COULD NOT REACH A VERDICT ON COUNT ONE AND THE COURT DECLARES A MISTRIAL,/TWS/CONTD: SENTENCING, DISPOSITION OF COUNT ONE, AND DISPOSITION OF PROBATION CASE #17005677/PRES: 09-07-18/PPRFCUST/VD: TRIAL DATE OF 08-02-18/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL/X:THIS MATTER IS NOT CALLED IN COURT OR REPORTED, COURT AND COUNSEL DISCUSSED TRIAL SCHEDULING IN CHAMBERS/CONTD:JURY TRIAL, PRETRIAL MOTIONS/LD:07-31-18/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN DA:ZHOU JUN HAO; COURTNEY CUNNIE; MUHAMMED AWAN; BLANCA RAMOS/X:MANDARIN INTERPRETER AI DONG NI,/EXHMA:1, 2, 3,AND 5 - PHOTOS/EXHM:4 - PHOTO/HTA1:1, 2, AND 4/X:THE COURT FINDS TRUE THE COUNT 1 ALLEGATION PURSUANT TO 12022(B)1 PC,/871D:3/BAIL:75000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/CTORD:EXHIBITS RETURNED/
